caption: A man with a bald head, wearing a white collared shirt and a black blazer, speaks while gesturing with his right hand. He is positioned in front of a blurred background showing other people in a professional setting. An on-screen graphic overlay spans the bottom of the frame, featuring a blue diamond logo and the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY". On the right side of the overlay, it says "Sponsored By" above a "MongoDB" logo. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression shifts slightly and his right hand moves from a cupped gesture with fingers slightly bent to pointing his index finger upward, and eventually settling into a neutral position. The background figures remain out of focus and relatively stationary, while the text and logos on the overlay remain constant.
